Title: Groovy Pop Art Style Modern Woman Illustration Sticker
Description:
Celebrate vibrant self-expression with this eye-catching pop art illustration sticker. Designed in a bold, groovy style, this piece features a stylized portrait of a woman against a vivid yellow background, making it an instant statement piece.

The striking use of bright pinks, electric blues, and lime greens captures a retro, artistic energy, perfect for adding a splash of fun and personality to any surface.

Details & Quality:

  • Made with high-quality, durable sticker material, ensuring vibrant colors that resist fading.
  • The intricate, hand-drawn feel of the pop art style adds a unique, artistic flair.
  • Perfect for laptops, water bottles, planners, car decor, or bullet journaling.

Whether you're decorating your workspace or gifting a piece of joyful art, this sticker adds a touch of modern, psychedelic cool to your daily life. A fantastic choice for art lovers, fashion enthusiasts, and pop culture fans.
